ddls:
CREATE TABLE "villas" (
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each villa */,
  "villa_name" TEXT /* Name of the villa */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the villa */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the villa */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the villa */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the villa */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the villa */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., pool, gym, spa) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the villa */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., available, booked, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_periods" (
  "pricing_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing period */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the pricing period belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pricing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pricing period */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the villa during this period */,
  "price_10_nights" REAL /* Price for 10+ nights for the villa during this period */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount applicable during the period */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for the booking */,
  "maximum_stay" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_periods_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inclusions" (
  "inclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inclusion */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the inclusion belongs to */,
  "inclusion_name" TEXT /* Name of the inclusion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inclusion */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the inclusion */,
  "is_included_in_package" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inclusion is part of a package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inclusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the booking belongs to */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "num_nights" INTEGER /* Number of nights booked */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "guest_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements or preferences of the guest */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package chosen by the guest (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "total_spend" REAL /* Total amount spent by the guest across all bookings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., manager, housekeeper) */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the staff member is assigned to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villa_staff" (
  "villa_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each villa-staff assignment */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the staff member is assigned to */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the staff member's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("villa_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villa_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villa_staff_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the request belongs to */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_message" TEXT /* Message from the guest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the response belongs to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was made */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Message from the staff */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who responded to the request */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the request in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the cancellation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the guest */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of the refund (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "staff_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the staff service (1-5) */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the cleanliness (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the value for money (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villa_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the facility is a premium feature */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villa_facilities_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villa_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the service belongs to */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is a premium service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villa_services_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa the package belongs to */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the package */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the package is a premium package */,
  "max_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_villa_id FOREIGN KEY ("villa_id") REFERENCES villas ("villa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_inclusions" (
  "package_inclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package inclusion */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package the inclusion belongs to */,
  "inclusion_name" TEXT /* Name of the inclusion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inclusion */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inclusion in the package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the inclusion in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_inclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_inclusions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
